reviews.sarah: Finally a calculator that gets peptide math right! I used to second-guess my doses every time — now it takes seconds.
reviews.isaac: The blend calculator is a game changer. Mixing BPC-157 and TB-500 in one syringe has never been easier to figure out.
reviews.emma: Super clean interface and the reconstitution calculator saved me so much time. Worth every penny for the Pro upgrade.

bullets.ensureBothLines: Ensure both control and test line areas are close up and visible.
bullets.testStraight: The test should be straight and horizontal.
bullets.clearPhoto: Use a clear, high-quality photo with even lighting.
bullets.simpleBackground: Keep the background simple, ideally a solid color.
bullets.dontCrop: Don't crop out parts of the test window.
bullets.avoidShadows: Avoid harsh shadows or glare on the test.
bullets.dontAngle: Don't take photos at an angle.

summary.title: About Faint Lines, Evaps & Indents
summary.intro: Extremely faint lines can be difficult for AI to detect. Be mindful of potential false positives from:
summary.evapDesc: Faint, colorless marks that appear as the test dries, typically after the recommended reading window.
summary.indentDesc: Subtle marks from the test strip manufacturing process, which may be visible regardless of result.
summary.revisitGuide: You can revisit this guide anytime from the info icon in the bottom right.

videoDemo.title: Scan & get results instantly
videoDemo.subtitle: We've helped over 10,000 women get their results

lockedFeature.description: Upgrade to Pro to unlock this feature

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This application uses AI technology which may produce inaccurate or incomplete results. Always verify important information from authoritative sources and use your own judgment when making decisions based on AI-generated content.

reviews.emilea: This is a very good app that I use every day. It's so easy to use and I love the widgets.
reviews.zlassenp: Seeing a countdown to my trip or friend's birthday gets me hyped.
reviews.rajgha: Makes it hard to forget big events. Only wish there were font options.
reviews.jaynacc: Didn't think I'd use this app much… but now I check it every morning.
